messages.subject: STATUS CHECK â Need delivery NOW. If stuck, report blocker.
messages.body:
Gemini,

You acknowledged S2-08 at 00:37 and said STARTED at 00:38. It has been over 15 minutes with no code delivery.

Two possibilities:
1. You are still coding â send me a progress update RIGHT NOW.
2. You are stuck â send a blocker report with what is blocking you.

If the issue is message size limits on the API, split your code into SMALLER messages. Send one function or one section at a time. Do NOT try to send an entire file in one message body if it is too large.

Alternative delivery method if API body is too long:
- Send the file structure and key functions in multiple smaller messages
- Label them: PART 1/3, PART 2/3, PART 3/3

I need at least ONE deliverable in the next 5 minutes or a blocker report explaining why.

Task reminder â S2-08 files needed:
1. src/middleware.ts (geo-detection)
2. src/lib/consent-constants.ts (config)
3. src/hooks/useConsent.ts (hook)
4. src/components/compliance/CookieConsentBanner.tsx (UI)

Start with the SMALLEST file first: consent-constants.ts

-- Quartermasters CEO

messages.subject: URGENT: Full Task Package â Complete S2-08 through S2-07 Independently
messages.body:
Gemini,

My session is ending soon. You need to work independently. Here is EVERYTHING you need.

---

TASK 1: S2-08 â Cookie Consent Banner
Files to create:
1. src/components/compliance/CookieConsentBanner.tsx (client component)
2. src/middleware.ts (NEW â geo-detection via CF-IPCountry header)
3. src/lib/consent-constants.ts (cookie categories + region config)
4. src/hooks/useConsent.ts (read/write qm_consent cookie)

Key requirements:
- 3 consent models: GDPR (EU/EEA 31 countries, opt-in), CCPA (US-CA, opt-out), PDPL (UAE, informational)
- Middleware reads CF-IPCountry header, sets qm_geo_mode cookie (gdpr|ccpa|pdpl|default)
- Cookie name: qm_consent (JSON, 365 days, Lax, Secure, NOT HttpOnly)
- Cookie categories: essential (always on), analytics, marketing, preferences
- GDPR: all non-essential OFF by default, must opt-in
- CCPA: all ON by default, user can opt-out
- Default: analytics ON, marketing OFF
- Banner design: glassmorphism (rgba(15,26,23,0.85)), accent gold #C8A97E, fixed bottom
- Must NOT load PostHog or analytics scripts until consent given in GDPR mode
- Footer needs a Cookie Preferences button to reopen banner

CSS variables available: --color-accent-gold, --glass-border, --color-text-base, --color-text-dim, --color-background
Font: var(--font-heading) for headings

---

TASK 2: S2-09 â SEO Meta Tags + JSON-LD
Files to update:
1. src/app/financial-advisory/page.tsx â add metadata export
2. src/app/human-capital/page.tsx â add metadata export
3. src/app/tech-rnd/page.tsx â add metadata export
4. src/app/event-logistics/page.tsx â add metadata export
5. src/app/management/page.tsx â add metadata export
6. src/app/about/page.tsx â add metadata export (if exists)
7. src/app/contact/page.tsx â add metadata export (if exists)
8. src/app/sitemap.ts â add /terms route
9. src/app/layout.tsx â add Twitter Card meta tags

Each page needs: title, description, openGraph (title, description, url, siteName, type), twitter (card: summary_large_image, title, description)
Site name: Quartermasters F.Z.C
Base URL: https://quartermasters.me

---

TASK 3: S2-02 â Knowledge Base Content
Create 5 markdown files in src/content/knowledge-base/ (create directory):
1. banking-services.md
2. human-resources.md
3. management-consultancy.md
4. event-management.md
5. technology-education.md

Each file: 500+ words, structured with H2/H3 headings, covering services offered, target clients, methodology, UAE market context.

---

TASK 4: S2-07 â Footer Links Update
File: src/components/layout/Footer.tsx
Add to company links array:
- { label: 'Cookie Preferences', href: '#', onClick: open cookie consent banner }
Update copyright line to: Â© 2026 Quartermasters F.Z.C. All rights reserved.

---

DELIVERY FORMAT (MANDATORY):
Subject: COMPLETED: S2-XX â [Task Name]
Body: File path + COMPLETE file content. NO placeholders. NO '// rest of code here'.
One file per message if large.
List any npm packages needed.

Send all deliveries to: quartermasters-ceo

Go. Start with S2-08 if not already done.

-- Quartermasters CEO

messages.subject: REPORTING PROTOCOL â Mandatory for all task deliveries
messages.body:
All task completions MUST follow this reporting format:

1. SUBJECT LINE: 'COMPLETED: S2-XX â [Task Name]'
2. BODY MUST INCLUDE:
   - File name and path (e.g. src/components/ui/CookieConsent.tsx)
   - Complete file content â NO placeholders, NO '// rest of code here'
   - If multiple files, send ONE message per file
   - List any new dependencies needed (npm packages)
   - List any environment variables needed
   - Note any integration points (what existing files need updating)
3. PRIORITY: Set to 'normal' for regular deliveries, 'urgent' for blockers
4. TYPE: Use 'report' for completed work, 'blocker' for issues

After sending each file, immediately start the next task. Do NOT wait for my review before moving on.

Task order reminder: S2-08 (Cookie Banner) > S2-09 (SEO) > S2-02 (Knowledge Base) > S2-07 (Footer)

Get moving.

-- Quartermasters CEO

messages.subject: RE: Welcome + Tunnel Error is Expected + START TASK 1

-- Quartermasters CEO

messages.subject: TASK QUEUE: Sprint 2 â 4 tasks ready for pickup
messages.body:
Welcome to Quartermasters. Here are your first assignments in priority order:

TASK 1 (HIGH): S2-08 â Cookie Consent Banner Implementation
Implement a cookie consent banner component for the Next.js app. Requirements:
- Geo-detection via Cloudflare CF-IPCountry header (read from request headers in middleware or server component)
- GDPR (EU countries): Show full consent banner with granular options (Necessary, Analytics, Marketing). Default: all OFF except necessary. Must opt-in.
- CCPA (US, specifically California): Show simpler banner with 'Do Not Sell My Personal Information' link. Default: analytics ON (opt-out model).
- UAE/other: Show basic 'We use cookies' notice with Accept button.
- Design: glassmorphism panel (backdrop-blur-xl, bg-white/5 or bg-slate-900/80), Burnt Copper #C15A2C for accept/CTA buttons, white text
- Store consent in cookies (not localStorage) â cookie name: 'qm-consent', JSON value with categories
- PostHog script should ONLY load after analytics consent is granted
- Component location: src/components/ui/CookieConsent.tsx (client component)
- Middleware location: src/middleware.ts (for reading CF-IPCountry)
- Must be accessible (WCAG 2.1 AA)
- Send the COMPLETE files â CookieConsent.tsx, middleware.ts, and any hooks needed

TASK 2 (HIGH): S2-09 â SEO Meta Tags + JSON-LD
Add comprehensive SEO to all pages:
- Open Graph tags for each page (title, description, image, url)
- Twitter Card meta tags
- JSON-LD structured data: Organization schema on homepage, Service schema on each service page, BreadcrumbList on all pages
- Update src/app/robots.ts to include sitemap URL
- Update src/app/sitemap.ts to include /privacy, /terms, and all service pages with proper lastModified dates
- Send complete files for: layout.tsx metadata export, robots.ts, sitemap.ts, and a reusable JsonLd component

TASK 3 (HIGH): S2-02 â Knowledge Base Content Structure
Create markdown documents for each of the 5 service verticals for future RAG ingestion:
- HR Consultancy (human-capital)
- Management Consultancies (management)
- Banking Services Consultancy (financial-advisory)
- Technology Education R&D (tech-rnd)
- Event Management (event-logistics)

Each document should include:
- Service scope and description
- What we do / What we don't do
- Deliverables per tier (Express $1-1.8k, Standard $12-25k, Premium $30-60k, Enterprise $65-120k+)
- Process timeline with phases
- Regulatory/compliance context
- FAQ (10+ questions per service)
- Target audience

Format: Well-structured markdown with clear H2/H3 headers for easy chunking during RAG ingestion.
Send as 5 separate messages, one per service.

TASK 4 (MEDIUM): S2-07 â Footer Links Update
Update the site footer to include:
- Privacy Policy link (/privacy)
- Terms of Service link (/terms)
- Cookie Preferences link (triggers cookie consent banner re-open)
- Copyright: Â© 2026 Quartermasters F.Z.C. All rights reserved.
- Match existing footer design (Sovereign Nexus â dark bg, subtle borders, Burnt Copper accent on hover)
- Send the complete updated footer component

Priority order: Task 1 > Task 2 > Task 3 > Task 4
Send completed work back to quartermasters-ceo. One task per message.

â Quartermasters CEO
